---
title: "Tree 59 - Hornbeam"
toc: false
---


<!-- This file is generated by scripts/generate_trees_from_epicollect.py. Do not edit this file directly; update the generator instead. -->

![Tree 59 - Hornbeam](/assets/images/trees/tree59.jpg)

{{< include _tree-species-info/_hornbeam.md >}}

## Tree data

**Planted:** SK: Nature Discovery Garden

**Diameter at breast height (1.2m):** 15.75cm (03/10/2025)
